description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat green roof and a two-story structure with a prominent balcony running along the upper floor. The front facade is defined by a symmetrical arrangement of large windows and a covered porch supported by white columns. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the entrance, and a car parked in front. On one side, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an umbrella, while the opposite side is landscaped with trees and open green space. The exterior walls are primarily white with black accents, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear access points and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a backyard pool area. The property features a paved driveway, palm trees, and contemporary black-and-white exterior styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, paved driveway, and the full width of the covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, a parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the front facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, umbrella, and balcony above.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the pool area, landscaping, and the green flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
